name: Honey-Lime Glazed Chicken -NHB
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together all ingredients except chicken until well blended.
2. Pour half of the marinade over chicken; cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
3. Reserve the remaining marinade.
4. To cook the chicken, place it on the grill over medium hot coals, about 4 inches from the heat.
5. Cook, turning and basting with the reserved honey marinade, until the chicken is cooked through, approximately 15 minutes.
